questions.question: Define a hash function. Provide an example of a simple hash function using modular arithmetic.
questions.hint: A hash function should be able to map any input to a fixed-size output.

questions.question: What is the Birthday Problem? Explain how it relates to hash functions. (Approx. 150-200 words)
questions.hint: Consider the probability of two or more people sharing the same birthday

questions.question: An attacker tries to brute-force a password by guessing it using a hash function that takes a 10-character string as input and produces a 16-character output. If the attacker has 1 million possible passwords to try, what is the advantage of using a longer input length?
questions.hint: Consider the number of possible combinations
